subject: Re:
body:
woujld he like me to call mort......2 where are you?

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> This is an e mail I got from Tom P - doesn't Mort
> hate Davos and think they are anti semetic? 
> 
> Davos was its usual chaotic self.  I was absolutely
> exhausted by Sunday.
> Went to the Clinton cock-tail party, thanks.  We all
> missed you there.
> The hot news was that one of the official Davos
> magazines (Global
> Agenda) contained the single most anti-semetic,
> anti-Israel article that
> I have ever read in my life.  Its title was "Boycott
> Israel" and it
> started with the Zionists of the 19th century and
> went from there.
> Written by a Palestinian, it was off the charts.  
> By Thursday, Klaus
> had issued an apology (sent to everyone at Davos)
> and pledged "never
> again".  He has subsequently written an 'editorial'
> email again
> apologizing and distancing himself from the article
> and indicating that
> he had fired the company that publishes that
> magazine for the WEF.  I
> hear that Mort Z. is asking to know how it happened.
>  I know from
> another source that Klaus privately agrees that the
> inclusion of this
> article must have been intentional and would have
> required multiple
> parties signing up to the conspiracy.  
> 
> 	That is my story and I am going to stick to it!
> 	Tom
> T
> 
> G
>

body_html:
woujld he like me to call mort......2 where are you?

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

This is an e mail I got from Tom P - doesn't Mort
hate Davos and think they are anti semetic?

Davos was its usual chaotic self. I was absolutely
exhausted by Sunday.
Went to the Clinton cock-tail party, thanks. We all
missed you there.
The hot news was that one of the official Davos
magazines (Global
Agenda) contained the single most anti-semetic,
anti-Israel article that
I have ever read in my life. Its title was "Boycott
Israel" and it
started with the Zionists of the 19th century and
went from there.
Written by a Palestinian, it was off the charts.
By Thursday, Klaus
had issued an apology (sent to everyone at Davos)
and pledged "never
again". He has subsequently written an 'editorial'
email again
apologizing and distancing himself from the article
and indicating that
he had fired the company that publishes that
magazine for the WEF. I
hear that Mort Z. is asking to know how it happened.
I know from
another source that Klaus privately agrees that the
inclusion of this
article must have been intentional and would have
required multiple
parties signing up to the conspiracy. 

That is my story and I am going to stick to it!
Tom

T

G
